title: shortia rotundifolia var. subcordata
intro: Shortia rotundifolia var. subcordata, also known as the golden bell or shortia, is a rare and endangered plant species native to North America, specifically in the mountainous regions of the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Shortia rotundifolia var. subcordata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve overall well-being. Shortia rotundifolia var. subcordata can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall health.
